wms.name: WMS
wms.title: Warehouse Management
wms.subtitle: Geodot WMS goes beyond traditional ERPs. Full traceability down to the last pack, automatic FIFO/FEFO and AI-driven picking optimization.

problem.title: Your warehouse hides costly inefficiencies
points: Expired product: you find out goods have expired when it's already too late.
Slow picking: operators walk the warehouse without an optimized route.
Phantom stock: the system says one thing, reality another.
Customer rejections: you ship product with little remaining shelf life.
No traceability: you don't know which lot you delivered to each customer.

solution.title: A WMS that sees what other systems can't

steps.title: Smart locations
steps.description: Multi-level structure with 3D visualization. The system suggests where to store each product based on its constraints.

steps.title: Full traceability
steps.description: By lot, expiration date and label. Immutable history of every movement for audit and compliance.

steps.title: Automatic FIFO/FEFO
steps.description: Configurable rules and per-customer shelf life. Blocks shipping of soon-to-expire product before it becomes a problem.

steps.title: Optimized picking
steps.description: The same routing engine applied inside the warehouse. AI overnight reorganization and step-by-step guides for operators.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your warehouse?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you the WMS with your own SKUs.

tms.name: TMS
tms.tagline: Your fleet under control, owned or outsourced
tms.title: Transport Management
tms.subtitle: Manage your entire transport operation from a single platform. Live tracking, up-to-date documentation and optimized costs for owned and outsourced fleets.

problem.title: Transport is your biggest cost and your biggest blind spot
points: No visibility: you don't know where your trucks are in real time.
Uncontrolled third parties: carriers operating however they want.
Expired paperwork: permits and licenses that lapse without warning.
Opaque costs: you can't attribute costs to routes or customers.
Manual coordination: phone calls and WhatsApp to keep everyone aligned.

solution.title: Full control of your transport operation

steps.title: Live tracking
steps.description: Continuous GPS position by position, geofences and automatic measurement of time spent at each customer.

steps.title: Unified fleet
steps.description: Owned and outsourced in the same view. Carrier portal with approval workflows and shared visibility.

steps.title: Documents and maintenance
steps.description: Expiration alerts for permits, licenses and insurance. Preventive maintenance by mileage or time.

steps.title: Automatic settlement
steps.description: Calculation by kilometer, delivery or mixed. Fuel control and accounting export ready for payment.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your transport?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and unify your owned and outsourced fleet in a single view.

paletizado.name: Smart Palletizing
paletizado.title: Smart
paletizado.subtitle: The only system that calculates palletizing in real time while it routes. It knows exactly what fits in each truck before it leaves.

problem.title: 15% of your trucks travel empty
points: Safety margin: you load to 85% "just in case" it won't fit.
Rules in someone's head: the expert palletizer knows, but the system doesn't.
In-transit damage: poorly stacked products that arrive damaged.
Slow picking: operators with no clear guide on how to build each pallet.
Load rejections: the customer receives crushed product.

steps.title: 300+ parameters
steps.description: Dimensions, weight, stackability, fragility, temperature and compatibility of every product in each calculation.

steps.title: Smart rules
steps.description: Stacking by product, family, customer, fragility and legal axle weight. The expert's knowledge, encoded in the system.

steps.title: Simultaneous recalculation
steps.description: Every time you add an order to a route, the system recalculates whether it really fits and alerts before it becomes a problem.

steps.title: Visual build guides
steps.description: Which product goes in each layer and position, with step-by-step sequence and operator validation.

cta.title: How many extra trucks are you sending?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll calculate your savings with palletizing simultaneous to routing.

torreControl.name: Control Tower
torreControl.title: Control Tower
torreControl.subtitle: Command center to monitor, analyze and act on your entire supply chain. From the warehouse to the last delivery.

problem.title: You operate blind until it's too late
points: Fragmented information: each system has its own view.
Late reaction: you find out about problems once they've already hit.
No clear metrics: you don't know what's working and what isn't.
Manual reports: hours compiling Excel for management.
Customers in the dark: they can't see the status of their orders.

steps.title: Live dashboard
steps.description: Operations map with every truck, delivery status, active alerts and daily KPIs compared against the average.

steps.title: Proactive alerts
steps.description: Configurable and escalating. Stopped truck, customer delay, late route or compromised cold chain, via dashboard, email, WhatsApp or SMS.

steps.title: Predictive AI
steps.description: Predicts delays before they happen, detects anomalies and suggests optimizations that learn from every delivery.

steps.title: Customer portal
steps.description: Customers see where their delivery is, live ETA, history and documents. Automatic daily, weekly and monthly reports.

cta.title: How much is operating without visibility costing you?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and unify WMS, TMS, Routing and Palletizing in a single board.

bebidas.title: Beverages &
bebidas.subtitle: 15+ years optimizing bottler operations. The expertise that only comes from solving the industry's hardest challenges: returnables, mixed palletizing and last-mile distribution.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Returnable products: every truck must reserve space for the empties coming back.
Mixed palletizing: glass, PET, can and Tetra Pak, each with its own stacking rules.
15% safety margin: you load at 85% because you don't know if the pallet plan fits.
BASIS integration: your core system lacks modern interfaces.
Specialized equipment (Tiger): not every SKU can be moved by full layer.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Truck load factor from 85% to 99% with simultaneous palletizing and routing.
Planning time cut from 3 hours to 15 minutes.
Full visibility of owned and third-party fleet.

cta.title: Ready to load your trucks at 100%?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how it works for operations like yours.

alimentos.title: Food &
alimentos.subtitle: Total control over perishable goods. Automatic FEFO, batch traceability, cold-chain monitoring and per-customer shelf-life compliance.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: FEFO rotation: the oldest product should ship first, but your warehouse isn't organized for it.
Per-customer shelf-life rules: each chain demands a different percentage or rejects you.
Cold chain: product leaves at 4°C and arrives at 12°C with no visibility en route.
Traceability: in a recall you don't know which customers received that batch.
Returns and rejections: without reason data, you can't improve.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Lower losses from expired product with automatic FEFO.
Shelf-life rejections eliminated with per-customer rules.
Full batch-to-customer traceability for targeted recalls.

cta.title: How much do you lose to expired product?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to eliminate those losses.

gobiernoResiduos.title: Government &
gobiernoResiduos.subtitle: Cleaner cities with smart routes. Waste-collection optimization, citizen participation and full transparency. Fewer kilometers, fewer emissions, more satisfaction.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Outdated routes: designed years ago while the city has changed.
Underused fleet: some trucks leave full, others half empty.
No visibility: you don't know where the trucks are in real time.
Uninformed citizens: they don't know when the truck passes their area.
High costs: unnecessary kilometers and wasted fuel.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Fewer kilometers driven with AI-optimized routing.
Fewer citizen complaints with app and control tower.
Tons of CO₂ avoided through shorter routes.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your collection service?
cta.subtitle: Book a meeting and we'll present an initial assessment at no cost.

logistica3pl.title: Logistics Operators
logistica3pl.subtitle: Multi-client management with full visibility. Each client has their own rules, SLAs and visibility needs. Geodot lets you manage them all from a single platform.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Multi-client management: each client with their own rules, SLAs and reports.
Client visibility: they want to know where their goods are in real time.
Load consolidation: orders from multiple clients to the same area, hard to combine.
Billing and settlement: pricing each service is manual and slow.
Differentiated SLAs: meeting 24h, 48h and specific windows at once is a juggling act.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Time on reports cut from 20 to 2 hours per week.
Billing time cut from 3 days to 4 hours with automatic settlement.
Truck utilization from 70% to 85% with smart consolidation.

cta.title: Ready to stand out from the competition?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to manage all your clients from a single platform.

healthcare.title: Healthcare &
healthcare.subtitle: When what you move is lives, every minute counts. Geodot was built for the complexity of healthcare logistics: guaranteed cold chain, full chain-of-custody traceability and smart dispatch that prioritizes what matters.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Critical cold chain: samples and medicines that lose 2-8°C mean lost diagnoses and discarded product.
Regulatory traceability: every movement must be logged with timestamp, temperature and owner for audits.
Strict time windows: samples have a shelf life and patient transfers are measured in minutes, not hours.
Thousands of SKUs with expiry dates: FIFO mandated by law, lots, controlled products and traceability for recalls.
Dispatch by urgency and capacity: assign the right unit, with the right equipment, to the right place.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Response time in an ambulance service with smart dispatch by proximity and capacity.
Chain-of-custody traceability, from the collection point to the central lab.
Out-of-FIFO expirations with automatic alerts and lot management per branch.

cta.title: Ready for logistics with zero tolerance for error?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to guarantee cold chain, traceability and smart dispatch in a single platform.

recintosFiscales.title: Bonded &
recintosFiscales.subtitle: Bonded warehouses, strategic fiscalized facilities and foreign-trade agencies operate under full regulatory scrutiny. Geodot digitizes warehouse control, document management and the traceability that ANAM, IMMEX and OEA require, with remote visibility for the authority.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Regulatory compliance: ANAM, IMMEX and OEA require integrated inventory, video and traceability systems with remote access for the authority.
Document control: pedimentos, MAWBs and waybills arrive in disparate formats and reconciling them by hand is slow and error-prone.
Traceability of goods in custody: every movement inside the facility must be logged and auditable.
Differentiated zones: hazardous materials, refrigerated and standard cargo coexist under different rules in the same warehouse.
Physical vs. document reconciliation: counting boxes in and out against what was declared, ideally with video evidence.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Bonded warehouse at AIFA digitized with iWMS and Etiqueta Zero, three zones (hazardous, refrigerated, standard).
Boxes loaded and unloaded counted with video evidence correlated to scanning, audit-ready for ANAM.
Foreign-trade integrated-logistics experience supercharged with end-to-end digital traceability.

cta.title: Ready for an end-to-end auditable facility?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to digitize warehouse control, document management and the traceability the authority requires.

hero.title: One complete platform for your entire
hero.subtitle: Geodot integrates the essential modules that work together to optimize every stage of your operation: from the warehouse to the final delivery. Unlike fragmented solutions, every module talks to each other in real time.

modules.title: Modules that work as one
modules.description: Geodot doesn't replace your ERP, it amplifies it. The routing engine and the palletizer work together, in real time, to optimize every load and every route.

cta.title: What's your biggest logistics challenge?
cta.subtitle: Book a personalized demo and we'll show you how Geodot can solve it.

hero.title: Results that
hero.subtitle: Companies of every size and industry have optimized their logistics with Geodot. Discover their stories and the numbers behind each transformation.

list.title: The impact of Geodot in numbers

items.result: Truck loads went from 85% to 99% and route planning from 3 hours to 15 minutes.
Automatic FEFO and lot-level traceability eliminated shelf-life rejections.
AI routing for 470 tons of daily waste, with ROI in under 12 months.

hero.title: Born from operations,
hero.subtitle: Our team has lived the challenges of logistics from the inside. That's why we built Geodot: the platform we ourselves wished we had.

mission.title: Connecting every point of the supply chain

body: After more than 40 combined years of experience in logistics, production and technology, we realized something: the existing tools didn't solve the whole problem. Some systems routed but didn't palletize. WMS that didn't talk to TMS. And in the middle, operations teams juggling to keep everything running.

Geodot was born to change that. We built the first platform that integrates WMS, TMS, Routing and Palletizing in a single solution, where the routing engine and the palletizer work together, in real time, to optimize every load and every route.

Our mission is to connect every point of the supply chain so companies operate more efficiently, sustainably and profitably. We don't promise magic: we promise results you can measure —fewer kilometers, fewer rejections, lower costs and fewer emissions.

We're a Mexican technology company, with experience across Mexico, Argentina, Colombia and Ecuador, and in industries like beverages, food, government and logistics. We imagine a world where every truck leaves at 100% capacity and every product arrives fresh to the right customer. That's the world we're building.

cta.title: Ready to meet us?
cta.subtitle: Book a call and tell us about your operation. We want to understand your challenges before proposing a solution.
